text:
Market today: The mood for tech and chips is cautious. Headlines confirm chip stocks have entered a bear market, which is the real driver impacting your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-46.77%) and SPAL (-47.83%) are leveraged and showing massive losses; their stops are currently above their prices, which needs immediate review. SMH (-12.55%) is also flagged "SELL" amidst the chip bear market news. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your chip exposure, especially SMH and SOXL, given the bear market news. Also, watch QQQ and QQQI as broader tech sentiment could weaken.

Bottom line: Focus on aggressive risk management and stop discipline, especially with your leveraged positions.
plays: Immediately re-evaluate the stops for SOXL and SPAL; their current stops are set above their prices, which is critical for these leveraged, deep-loss positions.
With chip stocks in a bear market, consider trimming SMH (current price 556.53, stop 540) or tightening its stop.
To potentially hedge against chip downside, consider a tactical long in SOXS (inverse chip ETF) at entry 52.77-52.27 with a stop at 51.07, as suggested by the scanner.
